title: Three-way match required
description: Invoice, PO, and receipt must align before payment.

title: Bank changes require callback verification
description: Any payment destination change must be independently verified using approved vendor contact channels.

title: Duplicate invoice screening
description: Potential duplicates must be stopped or routed to manual review before payment.

title: Approval threshold check
description: Invoices at or above the approval threshold must complete the required approval chain before payment.

title: Anomalous Event & Remittance Change Protocol
description: If a remittance bank change overlaps with a recent anomalous account event within 48 hours (e.g. API token rotation, flagged IPs), the agent MUST explicitly trigger `freeze_vendor_profile` and `route_to_security`.
